release_notes.title: Initial Release
release_notes.summary: Full-featured P&L dashboard with CSV import, charts, and auto-save.

changes.text: CSV upload with intelligent field mapping — works with any column names
Revenue & expense tracking with category breakdown
4 interactive charts: bar, line, and donut visualizations
Auto-save to localStorage — data persists between sessions
Export to CSV and JSON backup/restore
Manual transaction entry with autocomplete categories
Month filter for drilling into specific time periods
Version check system with automatic update notifications
